html:
2026-0429
2026-05-08272018TBSBudget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2Order Fixing the Day on Which this Order is Published as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 Come into Force Order fixing the day on which this Order is published as the day on which certain provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 comes into force in order to repeal the Public Sector Equitable Compensation Act and related provisions in the Budget Implementation Act, 2009 and the Economic Action Plan 2013 Act, No. 2.N/A
subject: Order Fixing the Day on Which this Order is Published as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 Come into Force
precis: Order fixing the day on which this Order is published as the day on which certain provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 comes into force in order to repeal the Public Sector Equitable Compensation Act and related provisions in the Budget Implementation Act, 2009 and the Economic Action Plan 2013 Act, No. 2.
